# {{< i18n dashboard_title >}} {.unnumbered}

This document contains the complete management lifecycle for **NOAA**.

## Project Metadata

| Item | Description |
|---------------------|-------------|
| **Project Name**    | {{< meta project-name >}} |
| **Current Phase**   | [Planning]{.status-badge} |
| **Last Audit**      |  |
| **Lead Specialist** | {{< meta author-name >}} |
| **Sponsor**         | {{< meta project-sponsor>}} <br> {{< meta executive-sponsor >}} |
| **PO**              | {{< meta project-po >}} |
| **PM**              | [Name] |
| **Status**          | In Planning |

## Quick Navigation
Use the sidebar to navigate between Initiation, Planning, and Monitoring artifacts.

```{mermaid}
graph TD
    P[Project] --> I[Initiation]
    P --> PL[Planning]
    P --> E[Execution]
    
    I --> I1[Charter]
    I --> I2[Stakeholders]
    
    PL --> PL1[Scope]
    PL --> PL2[Schedule]
    
    E --> E1[Development]
    E --> E2[Testing]
```

---

### Artifact Status
Navigate through the sidebar to access the required PMBOK and Agile documents.

::: {.ProjectBox title="Latest Milestone"}
The **Project Charter** has been formally authorized. We are currently
decomposing the **WBS** into the **Product Backlog** for Sprint planning. The
next milestone is the completion of the **Sprint 1 Backlog** by [Date].
:::
